entities.name: SOIL CARBONATES
entities.description: Soil carbonates, primarily calcium carbonate and dolomite, which regulate soil pH and carbon cycling

entities.description: A primary component of soil carbonates

entities.name: DOLOMITE
entities.description: A primary component of soil carbonates

entities.name: VOLUMETRIC CALCIMETER METHOD
entities.description: A method used to determine soil calcium carbonate equivalent

entities.name: ACID DISSOLUTION
entities.description: A process used to quantify soil carbonates

entities.name: CO2 MEASUREMENT
entities.description: A process used to quantify soil carbonates

entities.name: SOIL PH
entities.description: A measure of acidity or alkalinity in soil, regulated by soil carbonates

entities.name: CARBON CYCLING
entities.description: The process of carbon movement, regulated by soil carbonates

entities.name: SOIL CHEMISTRY
entities.description: The chemical composition of soil, evaluated by understanding soil carbonate content

entities.name: FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to sustain plant growth, evaluated by understanding soil carbonate content

entities.name: GLOBAL CARBON CYCLE
entities.description: The large-scale movement of carbon, in which soil carbonates play a role
